subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above hearts and minds, befitteth the Sovereign of sovereigns, from Whose ocean of utterance the waves surge forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از افئده و عقول مالک الملوکی را لایق و سزاست که از امواج بحر بیان
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @education of children; moral education, @transcendence; unknowability of God
